items.title: Drive to Chicago
items.detail: Arrive at hotel in the Loop, check in and drop bags

items.title: Millennium Park & Cloud Gate
items.detail: Walk the lakefront, snap photos at The Bean, explore the park

items.title: Deep Dish at Lou Malnati's
items.detail: The Buttercrust deep dish — order ahead, it takes 45 min

items.title: Art Institute of Chicago
items.detail: World-class collection — don't miss the Impressionist gallery

items.title: Italian Beef at Portillo's
items.detail: Get it dipped with hot giardiniera — classic Chicago lunch

items.title: Architecture River Cruise
items.detail: 90-minute boat tour with Chicago Architecture Center — best way to see the skyline

items.title: Blues at Kingston Mines
items.detail: Live blues on two stages — no cover before 8 PM on weekdays

items.title: Chicago to Milwaukee
items.detail: 90-minute drive north on I-94

items.title: Cheese Curds at Lakefront Brewery
items.detail: Friday fish fry and brewery tour — freshest cheese curds in the city

items.title: Milwaukee Art Museum
items.detail: The Calatrava-designed Quadracci Pavilion opens its wings at scheduled times

items.title: Third Ward Dinner
items.detail: Explore the Historic Third Ward — great restaurants and shops along the riverwalk

items.title: Milwaukee to Minneapolis
items.detail: 5-hour drive on I-94 West — stop in Madison for coffee if you want

items.title: Check in — North Loop Hotel
items.detail: Trendy neighborhood with walkable restaurants and breweries

items.title: Chain of Lakes by Bike
items.detail: Rent bikes at Nice Ride and ride the Grand Rounds trail around Lake Calhoun and Lake Harriet

items.title: Juicy Lucy at Matt's Bar
items.detail: The original Juicy Lucy — cheese-stuffed burger, cash only, expect a wait

items.title: Minneapolis Sculpture Garden
items.detail: Free outdoor sculpture park with the iconic Spoonbridge and Cherry

items.title: Midtown Global Market
items.detail: International food hall — try the Somali food stalls on Lake Street

items.title: Surly Brewing Beer Hall
items.detail: Massive beer hall, great food menu, grab a flight of their IPAs

items.title: First Avenue Live Music
items.detail: Prince's legendary venue — check the calendar for shows

items.title: Minneapolis to Madison
items.detail: 4-hour drive southeast on I-94 and I-90

items.title: Dane County Farmers' Market
items.detail: Saturday market on Capitol Square — if timing works, it's the best farmers' market in the Midwest

items.title: Walk State Street
items.detail: Capitol to campus — coffee shops, bookstores, and local boutiques

items.title: Dinner at The Old Fashioned
items.detail: Wisconsin comfort food — cheese curds, brandy old fashioned, and Friday fish fry

items.title: Breakfast at Mickies Dairy Bar
items.detail: Classic diner near Camp Randall — get the scrambler

items.title: Fromagination Cheese Shop
items.detail: Pick up Wisconsin artisan cheeses to bring home — they'll vacuum seal for travel

items.title: Depart Madison
items.detail: Head home or continue the adventure south to Chicago for a flight

notifications.text: Mild chance of rain on Day 5 in Minneapolis — check the First Avenue show schedule for indoor options
Added GPS coordinates for all stops — map view is now available

changeLog.title: Dane County Farmers' Market
changeLog.detail: Only runs on Saturday — may need to adjust
